rationale: Bootstrap entry. The numeric ceilings are placeholders (set to 0 so the gate denies launch on numeric grounds even if an unrelated path bypasses the calibration check) and are not load-bearing until rung 3 lands. Rung 3 (per-kernel manifest-shape dispatch) will produce a single-kernel cycle measurement; that becomes the calibration constant `bytesPerCycle` consumed by `bench/tools/predict_simfabric_wallclock.py`. Once rung 3 receipt lands at bench/out/r3-1-31b-manifest-simfabric-per-kernel/, set calibrationStatus to its sha256, calibrationSourcePath to its repo-relative path, and replace the placeholder ceilings with values backed by the simfabric runner timeout (R2-1 captured the d2h O(P^3) throughput pattern; the ceiling must keep the manifest-shape full-graph dispatch under that timeout).
